name: rinawarp-terminal-pro
description: RinaWarp Terminal Pro - AI-powered system diagnostic agent
author: RinaWarp Team <team@rinawarptech.com>

scripts.build:electron: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:preload && tsc -b tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.test:rina-runtime: npm run build:electron && node test/inline-rina.test.mjs && node test/rina-agent-safe-patch.test.mjs && node test/plan-risk.test.mjs && node test/plan-fallback.test.mjs && node test/fix-project-flow.test.mjs && node test/policy-gate-loading.test.mjs && node test/code-helpers.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:harness: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh harness-window-ready.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:fix-project: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh fix-project.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:telemetry: npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh telemetry.test.ts
scripts.e2e:smoke: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh
scripts.e2e:smoke:headed: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh --headed
scripts.e2e:golden: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && PLAYWRIGHT_CONFIG=e2e/playwright.config.ts bash scripts/run-electron-playwright.sh golden
scripts.dev: unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && npx electron .
scripts.build:all: npm run build:electron && npm run package:linux && npm run package:win
scripts.dist: pnpm dist:linux && pnpm release:metadata && pnpm verify:update-artifacts
